# Alakhsimar Singh

> Software engineer, machine learning researcher, freelance full-stack developer,
> and graphic designer. Final-year B.Tech Computer Science Engineering student at
> Dr. B. R. Ambedkar National Institute of Technology, Jalandhar (2022-2026).

Alakhsimar Singh builds production software, conducts machine learning research
in neuroimaging and computer vision, takes on freelance full-stack client work,
and does graphic/video editing design work. This site is organized into four
lenses, each a distinct profile of the same person.

## Tech

- [Tech profile](/tech): Software engineering — the Optum Technical Development Program internship and the Smart Notes Platform project.
- [Optum internship](/tech): Software Engineer Intern, Technical Development Program, Summer 2025. Ranked 1st in the Ireland/India cohort and Global Runner-up among 300+ interns across 6 countries; secured a Pre-Placement Offer.
- [Smart Notes Platform (code)](https://github.com/AlakhsimarSingh/smart_notes_platform.git): A full-stack, AI-native personal knowledge base with real-time collaboration (Yjs/Hocuspocus), a hybrid RAG chat pipeline (Groq + Cohere reranking), local semantic embeddings, and a 3D knowledge graph.

## Research (Machine Learning)

- [Research profile](/research): Machine learning research in neuroimaging, fMRI, and computer vision.
- [ACAM-J fMRI classification (preprint)](https://meditation.mgh.harvard.edu/files/Kumar_26_arXiv.pdf): "Machine Learning-Based Classification of Jhana Advanced Concentrative Absorption Meditation (ACAM-J) using 7T fMRI" — Kumar, Yang, Singh, Li, Sacchet. Under review at PLOS Biology.
- [LiDAR snow-pole detection (code)](https://github.com/AlakhsimarSingh/RangeModalitiesProject): "On the Role of Range in LiDAR-Based Snow-Pole Detection: A Principled Study of Modality Fusion" — Tiwari, Singh, Rafiq, Singh, Seipel, Bavirisetti. Under review at MFI 2026.
- [DBCATS — fMRI connectivity research (code)](https://github.com/AlakhsimarSingh/DBCATS.git): Georgia Institute of Technology research internship — Complex PCA (CPCA) for fMRI functional connectivity, accepted at CNS 2025.
- [VisioPhysioENet (paper)](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2409.16126): Multimodal engagement detection network fusing visual and physiological signals for e-learning.
- [Network vs ROI brain connectivity (research profile)](/research): "Network vs ROI Perspectives: Brain Connectivity Analysis using Complex Principal Component Analysis" — accepted at CNS 2025 (OCNS), Florence, Italy.
- [Visual Physiological Engagement Detection Network (research profile)](/research): Journal article submitted to Elsevier, under peer review.
- [Multimodal engagement detection & learner privacy (research profile)](/research): Book chapter in "The Dark Side of AI: Privacy Invasions and Data Vulnerabilities."

## Freelance

- [Freelance profile](/freelance): Full-stack client work and freelance case studies.
- [Maan Travels — live site](https://www.maantravels.com): Production full-stack booking platform for a luxury chauffeur service, replacing a legacy PHP site. Passwordless device-trust authentication.
- [Maan Travels — code](https://github.com/AlakhsimarSingh/maan_travels.git): Next.js 15, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Prisma, Supabase implementation.

## Design

- [Design profile](/design): Editing and graphic design portfolio, in progress. Organized 30+ student video-editing workshops (2023).
